verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ልደቱ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ ለሊሁ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the generations of Esau; this is Edom.
translations.kjv: Now these are the generations of Esau, who is Edom.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አንስቲያ ፡ እምነ ፡ አዋልደ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ሐዳሶ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ኤሎን ፡ ኬጥያዊ ፡ ወኤሌማ ፡ ወለተ ፡
                  ሐና ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴቤስ ፡ ኤውያዊ ፤

translations.lxx: And Esau took to himself wives of the daughters of the Chananites; Ada, the daughter of Ælom the Chettite; and Olibema, daughter of Ana the son of Sebegon, the Evite;
translations.kjv: Esau took his wives of the daughters of Canaan; Adah the daughter of Elon the Hittite, and Aholibamah the daughter of Anah the daughter of Zibeon the Hivite;

verses.geez: ወቤሴሞ[ት] ፡ ወለተ ፡ ይስማኤል ፡ እኅቱ ፡ ለናቡኦት ።

translations.lxx: and Basemath, daughter of Ismael, sister of Nabaioth.
translations.kjv: And Bashemath Ishmael’s daughter, sister of Nebajoth.

verses.geez: ወወለደቶ ፡ ሐዳሶ ፡ [ለኤልፋዝ ፡] ወቤሴሞት ፡ ወለደቶ ፡ ለራጉኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Ada bore to him Eliphas; and Basemath bore Raguel.
translations.kjv: And Adah bare to Esau Eliphaz; and Bashemath bare Reuel;

verses.geez:
ወኤሌማ ፡ ወለደቶ ፡ ለዮሔል ፡ ወለይጉ[ሜ]ል ፡ ወለቆሬ ፡ እሉ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ እለ ፡ ተወልዱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ በምድረ
                  ፡ ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: And Olibema bore Jeus, and Jeglom, and Core; these are the sons of Esau, which were born to him in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: And Aholibamah bare Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah: these are the sons of Esau, which were born unto him in the land of Canaan.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ደቂቆ ፡ ወአንስቲያሁ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ነባሬ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ [እንስሳሁ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡] ንዋዮ ፡ ዘአጥረየ
                  ፡ በምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ እምነ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ እኁሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Esau took his wives, and his sons, and his daughters, and all the persons of his house, and all his possessions, and all his cattle, and all that he had got, and all things whatsoever he had acquired in the land of Chanaan; and Esau went forth from the land of Chanaan, from the face of his brother Jacob.
translations.kjv: And Esau took his wives, and his sons, and his daughters, and all the persons of his house, and his cattle, and all his beasts, and all his substance, which he had got in the land of Canaan; and went into the country from the face of his brother Jacob.

verses.geez: እስመ ፡ ብዙኅ ፡ ንዋዮሙ ፡ ወኢክህሉ ፡ ኅቡረ ፡ ነቢረ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ብዝኅ ፡ ንዋዮሙ ።

translations.lxx: For their substance was too great for them to dwell together; and the land of their sojourning could not bear them, because of the abundance of their possessions.
translations.kjv: For their riches were more than that they might dwell together; and the land wherein they were strangers could not bear them because of their cattle.

verses.geez: ወኀደረ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ [ሴይር ፡] ወለሊሁ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ኤዶም ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Esau dwelt in mount Seir; Esau, he is Edom.
translations.kjv: Thus dwelt Esau in mount Seir: Esau is Edom.

verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ፍጥረቱ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ለኤዶም ፡ በደብረ ፡ ሴይር ።

translations.lxx: And these are the generations of Esau, the father of Edom in the mount Seir.
translations.kjv: And these are the generations of Esau the father of the Edomites in mount Seir:

verses.geez:
ወከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ [ኤልፋዝ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሐደሶ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ወራጉኤል ፡ ወልደ
                  ፡ ቤሴሞት ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ።

translations.lxx: And these are the names of the sons of Esau. Eliphas, the son of Ada, the wife of Esau; and Raguel, the son of Basemath, wife of Esau.
translations.kjv: These are the names of Esau’s sons; Eliphaz the son of Adah the wife of Esau, Reuel the son of Bashemath the wife of Esau.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤልፋዝ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ቴማን ፡ ወኤሞር ፡ ወሳፍር ፡ ወጎቶን ፡ ወቄኔዝ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Eliphas were Thæman, Omar, Sophar, Gothom, and Kenez.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, and Gatam, and Kenaz.

verses.geez:
ወተምናሕ ፡ ዕቅብቱ ፡ ለኤልፋዝ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አማሌቅሃ ፡ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሐዳሶ ፡
                  ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ።

translations.lxx: And Thamna was a concubine of Eliphaz, the son of Esau; and she bore Amalec to Eliphas. These are the sons of Ada, the wife of Esau.
translations.kjv: And Timna was concubine to Eliphaz Esau’s son; and she bare to Eliphaz Amalek: these were the sons of Adah Esau’s wife.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ራጉኤል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ናሖት ፡ ወዛራ ፡ ወሲም ፡ ወምዛኅ ፤ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ቤሴሞት ፡
                  ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Raguel; Nachoth, Zare, Some, and Moze. These were the sons of Basemath, wife of Esau.
translations.kjv: And these are the sons of Reuel; Nahath, and Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah: these were the sons of Bashemath Esau’s wife.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤሌማ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ሐና ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ዮሔል ፡ ወይጉሜል ፡
                  ወቆሬ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Olibema, the daughter of Ana, the son of Sebegon, the wife of Esau; and she bore to Esau, Jeus, and Jeglom, and Core.
translations.kjv: And these were the sons of Aholibamah, the daughter of Anah the daughter of Zibeon, Esau’s wife: and she bare to Esau Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ መሳፍንት ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤልፋዝ ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ቴማን ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወኤሞር ፡
                  መስፍን ፡ ወሳፍር ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወቄኔዝ ፡ መስፍን ፤

translations.lxx: These are the chiefs of the son of Esau, even the sons of Eliphas, the first-born of Esau; chief Thæman, chief Omar, chief Sophar, chief Kenez,
translations.kjv: These were dukes of the sons of Esau: the sons of Eliphaz the firstborn son of Esau; duke Teman, duke Omar, duke Zepho, duke Kenaz,

verses.geez:
ወቆሬ ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወጎቶን ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወአማሌቅ ፡ መስፍን ፤ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ኤልፋዝ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ኤዶም
                  ፡ እለ ፡ ተወልዱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሐዳሶ ።

translations.lxx: chief Core, chief Gothom, chief Amalec. These are the chiefs of Eliphas, in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Ada.
translations.kjv: Duke Korah, duke Gatam, and duke Amalek: these are the dukes that came of Eliphaz in the land of Edom; these were the sons of Adah.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ራጉኤል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ መሳፍንት ፡ ናሖት ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወዛራ ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወሲም ፡
                  መስፍን ፡ ወምዛኅ ፡ መስፍን ፤ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ራጉኤል ፡ በምድረ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ እለ ፡ ተወልዱ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ቤሴሞት ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Raguel, the son of Esau; chief Nachoth, chief Zare, chief Some, chief Moze. These are the chiefs of Raguel, in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Basemath, wife of Esau.
translations.kjv: And these are the sons of Reuel Esau’s son; duke Nahath, duke Zerah, duke Shammah, duke Mizzah: these are the dukes that came of Reuel in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Bashemath Esau’s wife.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤሌማ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ መሳፍንት ፡ ዮሔል ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወይጉሜል ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወቆሬ ፡
                  መስፍን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Olibema, wife of Esau; chief Jeus, chief Jeglom, chief Core. These are the chiefs of Olibema, daughter of Ana, wife of Esau.
translations.kjv: And these are the sons of Aholibamah Esau’s wife; duke Jeush, duke Jaalam, duke Korah: these were the dukes that came of Aholibamah the daughter of Anah, Esau’s wife.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ኤዶም ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Esau, and these are the chiefs; these are the sons of Edom.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Esau, who is Edom, and these are their dukes.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ሆርያዊ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ፡ ሉጣን ፡ ወሶባን ፡ ወሳባቅ ፡ ወአናን
                  ፤

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Seir, the Chorrhite, who inhabited the land; Lotan, Sobal, Sebegon, Ana,
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, who inhabited the land; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah,

verses.geez: ወዲሶን ፡ ወኢሶር ፡ *ወዲሳን* ፤ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ መሳፍንትሂ ፡ ኆርያዊ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሴይር ።

translations.lxx: and Deson, and Asar, and Rison. These are the chiefs of the Chorrhite, the son of Seir, in the land of Edom.
translations.kjv: And Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan: these are the dukes of the Horites, the children of Seir in the land of Edom.

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሉጣን ፡ ሑሪ ፡ ወሐማን ፡ ወእኅተ ፡ ሉጣን ፡ ትምናእ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Lotan were Chorrhi and Hæman; and the sister of Lotan, Thamna.
translations.kjv: And the children of Lotan were Hori and Hemam; and Lotan’s sister was Timna.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ሶባን ፡ አልዋን ፡ ወማኔሐት ፡ ወአቤል ፡ ወሰፋ ፡ ወአውናም ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Sobal; Golam, and Manachath, and Gæbel, and Sophar, and Omar.
translations.kjv: And the children of Shobal were these; Alvan, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shepho, and Onam.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሳባቅ ፡ ኤአ ፡ ወአናን ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ አናን ፡] ዘረከቦ ፡ ለያሜን ፡ በገዳም ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ይትረዐዩ ፡ አዕዱጊሁ ፡ ለ[ሳባቅ] ፡ አቡሁ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Sebegon; Aïe, and Ana; this is the Ana who found Jamin in the wilderness, when he tended the beasts of his father Sebegon.
translations.kjv: And these are the children of Zibeon; both Ajah, and Anah: this was that Anah that found the mules in the wilderness, as he fed the asses of Zibeon his father.

verses.geez: [ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ አናን ፡ ዲሶን ፡ ወኤሌሚ ፡ ወለተ ፡ አናን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Ana; Deson—and Olibema was daughter of Ana.
translations.kjv: And the children of Anah were these; Dishon, and Aholibamah the daughter of Anah.

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዲሶን ፡ ሕምዳን ፡ ወአስባን ፡ ወይትራን ፡ ወክራን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Deson; Amada, and Asban, and Ithran, and Charrhan.
translations.kjv: And these are the children of Dishon; Hemdan, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኢሶር ፡ ብልሐን ፡ ወዛኦን ፡ ወአቃን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Asar; Balaam, and Zucam, and Jucam.
translations.kjv: The children of Ezer are these; Bilhan, and Zaavan, and Akan.

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ (እንከ ፡) ደቂቀ ፡ ዲሳን ፡ ዑሳ ፡ ወአራን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Rison; Hos, and Aran.
translations.kjv: The children of Dishan are these; Uz, and Aran.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ሆሪ ፡ ሉጣን ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወሶባን ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወሳባቅ ፡ *መስፍን ፡ ወአናን* ፡
                  መስፍን ፤

translations.lxx: And these are the chiefs of Chorri; chief Lotan, chief Sobal, chief Sebegon, chief Ana,
translations.kjv: These are the dukes that came of the Horites; duke Lotan, duke Shobal, duke Zibeon, duke Anah,

verses.geez:
ወዲሶን ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወኢሶር ፡ መስፍን ፡ ወ*ዲሳ*ን ፡ መስፍን ፤ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ሆሪ ፡ በበመሳፍንቲሆሙ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ሴይር ።]

translations.lxx: chief Deson, chief Asar, chief Rison. These are the chiefs of Chorri, in their principalities in the land of Edom.
translations.kjv: Duke Dishon, duke Ezer, duke Dishan: these are the dukes that came of Hori, among their dukes in the land of Seir.

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ እለ ፡ ነግሡ ፡ በኤዶም ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ይንግሥ ፡ ንጉሥ ፡ ለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And these are the kings which reigned in Edom, before a king reigned in Israel.
translations.kjv: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over the children of Israel.

verses.geez: ወነግሠ ፡ በኤዶም ፡ ባ[ላ]ቅ ፡ [ወልደ ፡ ቤኦር ፡ ወስመ ፡ ሀገሩ ፡ ዲናባ ።

translations.lxx: And Balac, son of Beor, reigned in Edom; and the name of his city was Dennaba.
translations.kjv: And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

verses.geez: ወሞተ ፡ ባላቅ ፡] ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ ኢ[ዮ]ባብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዛራ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ቦሶራ ።

translations.lxx: And Balac died; and Jobab, son of Zara, from Bosorrha reigned in his stead.
translations.kjv: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

verses.geez: *ወሞተ ፡ ኢዮባብ ፡ ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ ሑሳም ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ቴማኒ ።

translations.lxx: And Jobab died; and Asom, from the land of the Thæmanites, reigned in his stead.
translations.kjv: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of Temani reigned in his stead.

verses.geez:
ወሞተ ፡ ሑሳም ፡ ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ አደድ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ብደድ ፡ ዘቀተሎሙ ፡ ለምድያም ፡ በሐቅለ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ወስመ ፡
                  ሀገሩ ፡ ዐዊት ።

translations.lxx: And Asom died; and Adad son of Barad, who cut off Madiam in the plain of Moab, ruled in his stead; and the name of his city was Getthaim.
translations.kjv: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.

verses.geez: ወሞተ ፡ አዳድ ፡ ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ ሰምላ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ መስርቃ ።

translations.lxx: And Adad died; and Samada of Massecca reigned in his stead.
translations.kjv: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

verses.geez: ወሞተ ፡ ሰምላ ፡ ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ ሳኦል ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ሮኦቦት ፡ እንተ ፡ ፈለግ ።

translations.lxx: And Samada died; and Saul of Rhoöboth by the river reigned in his stead.
translations.kjv: And Samlah died, and Saul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.

verses.geez: ወሞተ ፡ ሳኦል ፡ ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ በአለናን ፡ ወልደ ፡ አክቦር ።

translations.lxx: And Saul died; and Ballenon the son of Achobor reigned in his stead.
translations.kjv: And Saul died, and Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

verses.geez:
ወሞተ ፡ በአለናን ፡ ወልደ ፡ አክቦር ፡ ወነግሠ ፡ ህየንቴሁ ፡ አደር ፡ ወስመ ፡ ሀገሩ ፡ ፍጉ ፡ ወስመ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡
                  ምኤጠብኤል ፡ ወለተ ፡ መጥሬድ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ሜዘአብ* ።

translations.lxx: And Ballenon the son of Achobor died; and Arad the son of Barad reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Phogor; and the name of his wife was Metebeel, daughter of Matraith, son of Maizoöb.
translations.kjv: And Baalhanan the son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pau; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

verses.geez:
ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለመሳፍንተ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ በበነገዶሙ ፡ ወበበብሔሮሙ ፡ *ወበበ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ትምናዕ ፡
                  መስፍን ፡ ዐልዋ ፡ መስፍን ፡ ኢቴት ፡ መስፍን ፤

translations.lxx: These are the names of the chiefs of Esau, in their tribes, according to their place, in their countries, and in their nations; chief Thamna, chief Gola, chief Jether,
translations.kjv: And these are the names of the dukes that came of Esau, according to their families, after their places, by their names; duke Timnah, duke Alvah, duke Jetheth,

verses.geez: ኤሌማ ፡ መስፍን ፡ ኢላ ፡ መስፍን ፡ ፈኖን ፡ መስፍን ፤

translations.lxx: chief Olibema, chief Helas, chief Phinon,
translations.kjv: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,

verses.geez: ቄኔዝ ፡ መስፍን ፡ ቴማን ፡ መስፍን ፡ ሚብሳር ፡ መስፍን ፤

translations.lxx: chief Kenez, chief Thæman, chief Mazar,
translations.kjv: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,

verses.geez:
መግዲኤል ፡ መስፍን ፡ ዒራም ፡ መስፍን ፤ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ በበማኅደሮሙ ፡ ዘበምድሮሙ* ፡ ወለሊሁ
                  ፡ ዔሳው ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለኤዶም ።

translations.lxx: chief Magediel, chief Zaphoin. These are the chiefs of Edom in their dwelling-places, in the land of their possession; this is Esau, the father of Edom.
translations.kjv: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram: these be the dukes of Edom, according to their habitations in the land of their possession: he is Esau the father of the Edomites.
